records.question: What employees named Henry with the initial B were hired on 1994-11-15 and born exactly on 1961-11-2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1994-11-15' AND employee.emp_dob = '1961-11-2' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Henry'
records.pred_sql: SELECT EMP_NUM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_INITIAL = 'B' AND EMP_HIREDATE = '1994-11-15' AND EMP_DOB = '1961-11-2' AND EMP_FNAME = 'Henry'

records.question: Which employees named Todd H. Wilson, born on 1966-10-19, hired on 1990-11-6, have the job code CUST?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_hiredate = '1990-11-6' AND employee.emp_initial = 'H' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Wilson' AND employee.emp_dob = '1966-10-19' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Todd' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'CUST'
records.pred_sql: SELECT EMP_NUM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_HIREDATE = '1990-11-6' AND EMP_INITIAL = 'H' AND EMP_LNAME = 'Wilson' AND EMP_DOB = '1966-10-19' AND EMP_FNAME = 'Todd' AND EMP_JOBCODE = 'CUST'

records.question: Which employees with the initial B, hired on 1978-8-1, have the job code PROF and work in the Accounting department within the BUS school?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B' AND department.dept_name = 'Accounting' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num
FROM employee
WHERE emp_initial = 'B'
  AND emp_jobcode = 'PROF'
  AND emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM department
    WHERE department.emp_num = employee.emp_num
      AND dept_name = 'Accounting'
      AND school_code = 'BUS'
  )

records.question: Who is the employee named Gerald Graztevski, born on 1939-3-18, with initial B, teaching in class room KLR211, working in the BUS school with a department extension of 3119?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND class.class_room = 'KLR211' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Gerald' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Graztevski' AND employee.emp_dob = '1939-3-18' AND department.dept_extension = '3119'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num
FROM employee
WHERE emp_initial = 'B'
  AND emp_fname = 'Gerald'
  AND emp_lname = 'Graztevski'
  AND emp_dob = '1939-3-18'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM class
      WHERE class.prof_num = employee.emp_num
        AND class.class_room = 'KLR211'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM department
      WHERE department.emp_num = employee.emp_num
        AND department.school_code = 'BUS'
        AND department.dept_extension = '3119'
  )

records.question: Which employees were born exactly on 1940-6-20 and have taught classes linked to courses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN course ON class.crs_code = course.crs_code
WHERE employee.emp_dob = '1940-6-20'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num
FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_dob = '1940-6-20'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM class
    JOIN course ON class.crs_code = course.crs_code
    WHERE class.prof_num = employee.emp_num
)

records.question: Which employees teach classes that meet exactly at MWF 8:00-8:50 a.m?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
WHERE class.class_time = 'MWF 8:00-8:50 a.m.'

SELECT employee.emp_num
FROM employee
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM class
    WHERE class.prof_num = employee.emp_num
      AND class.class_time = 'MWF 8:00-8:50 a.m.'
)

records.question: Which employees were born exactly on 1970-3-12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_dob = '1970-3-12'
records.pred_sql: SELECT EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPLOYEE.EMP_DOB = '1970-3-12'

records.question: Which employees named Ralph F Matler, born on 1973-12-2 with job code PROF, have a professor record where the highest degree is MBA and the extension is 2851?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN professor ON employee.emp_num = professor.emp_num
WHERE professor.prof_high_degree = 'MBA' AND employee.emp_dob = '1973-12-2' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Ralph' AND employee.emp_initial = 'F' AND professor.prof_extension = '2851' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Matler' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num
FROM employee
WHERE emp_dob = '1973-12-2'
  AND emp_fname = 'Ralph'
  AND emp_initial = 'F'
  AND emp_lname = 'Matler'
  AND emp_jobcode = 'PROF'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM professor
    WHERE professor.emp_num = employee.emp_num
      AND prof_high_degree = 'MBA'
      AND prof_extension = '2851'
  )

records.question: Which employees whose initial is B are involved in both classes and departments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num
FROM employee
WHERE emp_initial = 'B'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM class WHERE class.prof_num = employee.emp_num
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM department WHERE department.emp_num = employee.emp_num
  )
